overall.description: A ship simulator game depicting a first-person view from a vessel's bridge during a nighttime storm. The ship moves steadily through dark waters while navigation monitors display radar and chart data, with a dramatic lightning strike briefly illuminating the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigation station overlooking the bow

agents.ego_description: operating the ship's navigation systems while cruising through open ocean at night

entered.detail: navigation display showing chart plotter with yellow landmasses on blue background
circular radar screen with sweeping yellow beam showing contacts
blue screen displaying depth sounder or sonar data
triangular bow of the ship with railings and deck equipment visible in darkness
metal safety railing at the front of the bridge
dark water surface extending to the horizon

segments.scene_description: The view from a ship's bridge shows three navigation monitors displaying chart, radar, and depth data. The ship moves steadily forward through dark ocean waters at night, with the bow deck visible through the forward windows. The radar sweeps continuously, monitoring the surrounding area.

events.description: bright lightning flash illuminates the ship's bow and surrounding ocean, revealing heavy fog and rain before fading back to darkness

agents.ego_description: maintaining course through the storm as lightning strikes nearby

segments.scene_description: The ship continues through the stormy night as a brilliant lightning strike flashes outside the bridge windows, momentarily illuminating the fog-shrouded bow and churning ocean with stark white light. The navigation monitors remain active as the scene quickly returns to darkness, with the radar continuing its sweep.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady progression through a dark, stormy ocean that is momentarily transformed by a sudden burst of atmospheric light. It begins with a view from the ship's bridge, where navigation monitors display active radar and chart data while the vessel pushes forward into the nighttime void. As the ship continues its course, a brilliant lightning strike flashes outside the forward windows, instantly illuminating the fog-shrouded bow and the churning whitecaps of the sea. The scene then quickly recedes back into deep darkness, leaving only the rhythmic sweep of the radar and the glow of the monitors to guide the ship through the storm.
